hooks.command: curl -sf http://mcp-server:3100/health > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '✅ Workbench services running' >&2 || echo '⚠️  Workbench services not reachable — run make up first' >&2

echo '⚠️  Context was compacted. Your conversation history has been preserved. To restore context:
  1. Read CLAUDE.md for project architecture
  2. /recall session:working-on — what you were working on
  3. /recall session:compact-summary — full session summary with tool calls and decisions
  4. /query <topic> — search the knowledgebase for anything discussed earlier
The full transcript is saved in .workbench/transcripts/' >&2; exit 2

echo 'Before stopping: save your working state so the next session can pick up where you left off.
  /remember session:working-on "<what you were doing>"
  /remember session:decisions "<key decisions made>"' >&2; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo $INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("inputs",{}).get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '^documents/\|/documents/'; then echo "📄 File written to documents/ — consider running /ingest $FILE to add it to the knowledgebase" >&2; exit 2; fi
echo 'Blocked: rm -rf with wildcard. Be more specific about what to delete.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: docker system prune would destroy workbench volumes. Use docker compose down -v if you need to reset.' >&2; exit 2
